appendResponse(uint256,string,bytes32).notice: Append a response to a review (rebuttal, explanation, follow-up).         Anyone can respond, but typically the subject agent owner responds.

createReview(address,address,bytes32,byt.notice: Create a review. The `reviewer` parameter is the actual reviewer's         agent address (not necessarily msg.sender, since the server may relay).         When routed through DelegationManager in the future, msg.sender         will be the DelegationManager and reviewer will be the delegator.

getAverageScore(address).notice: Get average overall score for a subject (non-revoked reviews only).
